description: Renovate config for ansible-k8s-wireguard. Tracks Kubernetes, CNI plugins, aqua-managed CLIs, GitHub Actions and Python dev deps. See inventory.yml / aqua.yaml for where each version lives.

customManagers.description: Kubernetes package version (inventory.yml). Rewrites only the upstream X.Y.Z; the Debian package revision suffix (e.g. -1.1) is preserved verbatim because apt install needs an exact version string.
CNI plugins release tag (inventory.yml). Keeps the leading v (used verbatim in the download URL).
aqua.yaml: registry ref (annotated with # renovate: depName=...) and owner/repo@version packages.

packageRules.description: Kubernetes: group + require manual review, soak 7 days.

Kubernetes: only propose PATCH bumps automatically. Minor/major change the derived apt channel and are constrained by version-skew rules, so they are done manually (surfaced on the Dependency Dashboard).
aqua-managed CLIs (uv, just, aqua-registry): group and automerge patch bumps.
GitHub Actions: group and automerge minor/patch/digest after a short soak.
Python dev deps (pyproject.toml): automerge minor/patch after a short soak.

schedule: before 9am on the first day of the month
